offensive.name: Fierce
offensive.description: Your fire burns hotter with every drop of fury.
tiers: The damage is turned into Cognitive Fire Damage and the total damage output increases by 2 additional dice.
The fire damage increases by 4 additional dice.
Fire damage increases by 6 additional dice. Creatures that fail the save or are hit directly take fire damage equal to Five Times your Verum Modifier at the start of their next turn.

Fire damage increases by 8 additional dice. Creatures that fail or are hit directly are Ablaze — taking Five Times your Verum Modifier at the start of each of their turns for 1 minute, unless extinguished by cognitive means that counter this effect.

supportive.name: Life-Bringer
supportive.description: Fire is not only death. It is the light that holds back the dark.
tiers: When this effect damages a creature, you or one ally within 30 feet may regain 1d4 hit points.
You may split the healing between two allies for a combined total of 2d6 hit points.
If a creature died within the last round and was within range of the effect, you may restore them to 1 HP in a burst of reviving flame.

Choose up to 5 allies touched by the flame. Each regains 6d10 hit points, removes one condition (except Petrified or Unconscious), and is wreathed in fire for 1 minute, dealing 1d8 fire damage on melee hits.

supportive.name: Unrelenting Heat
supportive.description: Your flame cannot be denied by resistance or resilience.
tiers: This effect's fire damage ignores resistance.
The fire bypasses immunity, dealing half damage to normally immune creatures.
Fire damage dealt to flammable objects or creatures vulnerable to fire is always treated as maximum.
The fire bypasses all resistance and immunity, prevents invisibility or hiding via a persistent heat signature, and dissolves magical barriers of 5th level or lower on contact.

supportive.name: Infernal Passion
supportive.description: You do not merely cast fire — you become it. (Save: Wisdom)
tiers: Gain advantage on your next Charisma check or saving throw before the end of your next turn.
For 1 minute, you and allies within 30 feet gain +2 to attack rolls while the fire persists.
Enemies within 60 feet who fail a Wisdom saving throw are Frightened of you for 1 round.

You radiate burning presence. Hostile creatures beginning their turn within 30 feet must succeed on a Charisma saving throw or become Charmed, Frightened, or Enraged (your choice) for 1 minute. Allies within range gain immunity to fear and +1 to all damage rolls.

control.name: Wildflame Wake
control.description: Fire leaves behind more than ashes — it reshapes the ground itself. (Save: Dexterity)
tiers: Terrain scorched by the effect becomes difficult terrain for enemies until the end of your next turn.
The area becomes blazing terrain — any creature starting its turn there takes 2d6 fire damage.
Creatures entering or starting their turn in scorched terrain must succeed on a Dexterity saving throw or be Ignited.

The terrain erupts into a Living Flame Storm for 1 minute. Hostile creatures treat it as impassable solid terrain unless immune to fire. Any creature that enters or starts its turn there takes 5d10 fire damage.

complementEffects.name: Ember's Bite
complementEffects.description: The primary effect carries a burning edge.
complementEffects.effect: On a hit or failed saving throw, the target takes bonus fire damage equal to one damage die of the primary effect's type (min 1d6). On a failed Dexterity save vs your Verum DC, they are also Ignited — taking 1d6 fire damage at the start of their next turn.
upgrades: Level 5+: Bonus damage increases to two dice.
Level 11+: Bonus damage increases to three dice, and the Ignited condition lasts 1 minute instead of one turn.

complementEffects.name: Hearthglow
complementEffects.description: A flicker of warmth accompanies the spell.
complementEffects.effect: When the primary effect resolves, one creature within 30 feet regains HP equal to your spellcasting modifier. If the primary effect heals, this is added on top.
upgrades: Level 5+: Choose up to two creatures to receive this healing.
Level 11+: Each healed creature also gains temporary HP equal to your spellcasting modifier until the start of your next turn.

complementEffects.name: Cinder March
complementEffects.description: Wherever the spell lands, fire claims the ground.
complementEffects.effect: The point of impact becomes scorched terrain in a 10-foot radius until the end of your next turn. Creatures must succeed on a Dexterity save vs your Verum DC or be pushed 5 feet away from the center.
upgrades: Level 5+: Scorched terrain persists 1 minute. Creatures entering take 1d6 fire damage per 5 feet traveled through it.
Level 11+: Creatures that fail cannot willingly move toward the center for 1 round.

complementEffects.name: Smoldering Haze
complementEffects.description: The heat rattles the mind as much as the body.
complementEffects.effect: Creatures hit by or failing their save must succeed on a Dexterity save vs your Verum DC or suffer disadvantage on their next attack roll.
upgrades: Level 5+: Penalty extends to all attack rolls until the end of their next turn.
Level 11+: Creatures that fail also have their movement speed reduced by 10 feet until the end of their next turn.
